overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The camera moves along wet streets past towering cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements and moderate vehicle traffic, ending at a corner noodle shop with traditional red lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with elevated transit

events.description: white sports car drives past from right to left on the wet street
pedestrian enters frame from the left side walking in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing the neon-lit street and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving past on the wet asphalt with headlights on
pedestrian walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: building with bright red neon signage displaying Japanese characters and pink structural columns
massive curved transit structure overhead with glowing green and red lights
towering futuristic building with illuminated windows and red warning lights on top
tall palm tree silhouetted against the neon lights in front of the arcade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, dominated by a building with bright red neon signage on the right. An elevated maglev track curves overhead against the hazy sky. A white sports car passes by on the wet road, and a pedestrian appears walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street with mixed residential and commercial buildings

events.description: camera turns left to follow the curve of the street
approaching intersection with visible traffic lights and crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: turning left to follow the curved street while maintaining forward walking momentum

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: curved multi-story building with balconies, neon signs, and weathered facade
tall industrial pole with traffic signals and surveillance cameras

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left along a curved street, revealing a distinctive curved residential block on the left with glowing windows. The elevated maglev track shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera approaches an intersection with traffic lights. A pedestrian in a blue jacket walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and holographic advertising

events.description: black SUV drives through the intersection from right to left
oncoming vehicle with bright headlights approaches and passes through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating around moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection with brake lights illuminated
oncoming car with bright white headlights approaching the intersection

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying green imagery and Japanese text
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wide urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. A black SUV passes through the intersection while a holographic billboard floats on the right side. Oncoming traffic with bright headlights approaches from the distance. The traffic light pole moves to the left as the camera advances across the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with traditional noodle shop and neon signage

events.description: arrive at corner with distinctive green neon noodle shop and traditional red lanterns
pedestrian in long coat temporarily blocks the view while crossing in front of camera

agents.ego_description: approaching the corner noodle shop and observing the traditional red paper lanterns hanging outside

notable_agents.action: person in long beige coat crossing the street from right to left in front of the camera

entered.detail: corner shop with bright green neon signage, traditional Japanese red paper lanterns, and teal structural columns
open food counter with menu displays and warm interior lighting visible through the entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at a street corner featuring a traditional noodle shop illuminated by bright green neon and red paper lanterns. A pedestrian in a long coat crosses in front of the view. The shop's open counter and menu displays are visible on the left, while the megastructures of the city loom in the background. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked futuristic city, moving from a neon-dominated thoroughfare toward a traditional street-corner eatery. It begins on a wet road beneath a curving maglev track, passing a building with bright red signage as a white sports car and a pedestrian glide through the hazy night. As the camera turns left, the view shifts toward a curved residential block with glowing windows before approaching a busy intersection where the maglev track moves to the right. The scene then expands across a wide urban crossing marked by yellow lines, passing a floating holographic billboard and oncoming traffic with bright headlights. Finally, the camera arrives at a street corner where the towering megastructures of the city give way to a noodle shop illuminated by green neon and red paper lanterns reflecting on the damp pavement.
